init_hook: echo 'Foreman devbox ready. Run: devbox run install && devbox run db:up && devbox run db:migrate'

db:up: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose up -d postgres; elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose up -d postgres; else echo 'Docker CLI not found. Install Docker Desktop, Colima, or OrbStack and retry.' >&2; exit 1; fi

for i in {1..30}; do health=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Health.Status}}' foreman-postgres 2>/dev/null || echo starting); echo "postgres health: $health"; if [ "$health" = healthy ]; then exit 0; fi; sleep 1; done; echo 'Postgres did not become healthy in time.' >&2; exit 1
scripts.db:down: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose down; elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose down; else echo 'Docker CLI not found. Install Docker Desktop, Colima, or OrbStack and retry.' >&2; exit 1; fi
db:reset: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose down -v; elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose down -v; else echo 'Docker CLI not found. Install Docker Desktop, Colima, or OrbStack and retry.' >&2; exit 1; fi

if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose up -d postgres; elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose up -d postgres; else echo 'Docker CLI not found. Install Docker Desktop, Colima, or OrbStack and retry.' >&2; exit 1; fi

for i in {1..30}; do health=$(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Health.Status}}' foreman-postgres 2>/dev/null || echo starting); echo "postgres health: $health"; if [ "$health" = healthy ]; then break; fi; sleep 1; done
scripts.db:logs: if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker compose logs -f postgres; elif command -v docker-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker-compose logs -f postgres; else echo 'Docker CLI not found. Install Docker Desktop, Colima, or OrbStack and retry.' >&2; exit 1; fi
